article_meta.title: President Donald Trump’s mass deportation operation is expected to ramp up in 2026 as newly hired military lawyers-turne

reasoning: Classification (Lean Right) fits the article’s right-leaning framing and terminology, but confidence is a bit high for mixed signals, and evidence is vague with reliance on publisher reputation rather than specific author prose.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Authorial choices (e.g., use of 'illegal immigrants,' efficiency framing of deportations, source selection) support Lean Right; inclusion of some critical voices keeps it from 'Right.'
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.85 is somewhat high given the article includes notable critical perspectives and some neutral explanatory prose; a 0.7–0.8 range would be better.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Indicators were general and referenced publisher lean; lacked specific quotes from author’s prose (e.g., didn’t cite 'illegal immigrants') and relied on broad framing claims.
